title: Site Regulations
description: The Tent refused to deploy inside a dungeon (F3 rule). The party takes it up with the canvas.

steps.text: The Tent refused to deploy. It cited conditions.

lines.speaker: Cleric
lines.text: It's canvas. How does canvas decline?

lines.speaker: Rogue
lines.text: There's a tag. 'Not rated for ambient dread.' Crystal light counts as a permit.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: We sleep at the crystal or we don't sleep.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: The tent has a union. Honestly? I respect it.
